archimate:TechnologyService.name: File Storage
archimate:TechnologyService.documentation:
Definition: File storage ABB is a Technology Service that implements the behaviour of a software tool that refers to the process of storing and organizing digital files in a secure and efficient manner
Source: Inspired in the definition provided by relebant database vendors
Example: The following implementation is an example of how this specific Architecture Building Block (ABB) can be instantiated as a Solution Building Block (SBB): GARTNER- Distributed File Systems and Objects Storage Reviews and Ratings. https://www.gartner.com/reviews/market/distributed-file-systems-and-object-storage
Interoperability Dimension: Structural IoP
LOST view: Technical view - infrastructure
Interoperability Saliency: File Storage ABB is salient for technical interoperability because it set up the data integration mechanism based on different files. This kind of file storage permit also ensures data provenance of the information considering file modification and creation.
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/FileStorageTechnologyService
ABB name: eira:FileStorageTechnologyService
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/FileStorageTechnologyService
Interoperability Layer: TechnicalInfrastructure

properties.value: File storage ABB is a Technology Service that implements the behaviour of a software tool that refers to the process of storing and organizing digital files in a secure and efficient manner
Inspired in the definition provided by relebant database vendors

The following implementation is an example of how this specific Architecture Building Block (ABB) can be instantiated as a Solution Building Block (SBB): GARTNER- Distributed File Systems and Objects Storage Reviews and Ratings. https://www.gartner.com/reviews/market/distributed-file-systems-and-object-storage

File Storage ABB is salient for technical interoperability because it set up the data integration mechanism based on different files. This kind of file storage permit also ensures data provenance of the information considering file modification and creation.
